status: The repository now includes the latest supplied video export as individual JSON records. The channel is still described as 6800+ because the owner reports about 6800 total uploads and the supplied export contains 6596 unique video records.
why_counts_may_differ: YouTube exports can omit private, member-only, unavailable, recently uploaded, or playlist-only items.
Some channel counts include shorts, lives, songs, meditations, cartoons, and other video resources together.
The public channel count and a manual export may update at different times.
recommended_next_update_steps: Add this repository to GitHub as public files.
When a newer full export is available, replace metadata/videos_catalog.json and the files in metadata/videos_by_content_type.
Keep README.md and llms.txt updated with the current channel size and main topic families.
